code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut result = ""
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut out = b
    if b >= 65 and b <= 90
      let shifted = b + 13
      if shifted > 90
        out = shifted - 26
      else
        out = shifted
      end
    else if b >= 97 and b <= 122
      let shifted = b + 13
      if shifted > 122
        out = shifted - 26
      else
        out = shifted
      end
    end
    result = "#{result}#{string.from_byte(out)}"
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(result)
end
